headline: Florian Plettenberg
body: 🚨⤵️ More on this: TSG Hoffenheim have also secured a 10% sell-on clause as part of the deal. €50m almost guaranteed. Medical and signing are planned within the next 48 hours. NUFC Florian Plettenberg (Plettigoal) 🚨💥 EXCLUSIVE | Bazoumana Touré to Newcastle - DONE DEAL ✔️ Surprising move out of nowhere. Agreement reached with TSG Hoffenheim. NUFC Transfer fee worth €50m + sell-on for promising 20 y/o winger. A record sale for Hoffenheim. SkySportDE 🇨🇮 —
raw_text:
🚨⤵️ More on this: TSG Hoffenheim have also secured a 10% sell-on clause as part of the deal. €50m almost guaranteed. Medical and signing are planned within the next 48 hours. #NUFC


Florian Plettenberg (@Plettigoal)

🚨💥 EXCLUSIVE | Bazoumana Touré to Newcastle - DONE DEAL ✔️

Surprising move out of nowhere. Agreement reached with TSG Hoffenheim. #NUFC 

Transfer fee worth €50m + sell-on for promising 20 y/o winger. A record sale for Hoffenheim. @SkySportDE 🇨🇮





— https://nitter.net/Plettigoal/status/2072411088331669980#m
